$schema_note: Seed prompts surfaced in the /generate UI as a row of 'Try this' chips. Each entry is non-binding; they're just suggestions. The UI clicks them into the textarea and lets the user edit before submitting.

starters.label: Spinning loader
starters.prompt: A subtle circular loader: a thin teal arc rotating 360° smoothly, looped seamlessly over 60 frames at 30 fps. 200×200, transparent background.

starters.label: Color-pulsing dot
starters.prompt: A circle that cross-fades between brand teal (#14B8A6) and a darker variant, looped seamlessly over 60 frames.

starters.label: Three-dot wait
starters.prompt: Three small dots in a row, each pulsing in opacity and scale on a staggered 200ms offset, looped over 60 frames at 30 fps. 240×60, transparent background.

starters.label: Indeterminate progress bar
starters.prompt: A Material-style indeterminate progress bar: a slim rounded rect (320×4, teal) with a moving highlight that sweeps left-to-right, looped over 90 frames at 30 fps.

starters.label: Success checkmark
starters.prompt: A green checkmark drawing on over 30 frames, then a small bounce on completion. Stroke ~6px, rounded caps. Hold for 30 frames after.

starters.label: Green confetti burst
starters.prompt: A radial burst of ~24 small green and teal confetti pieces erupting from center, scaling up and fading out over 36 frames. 320×320, transparent background.

starters.label: Thumbs-up bounce
starters.prompt: A thumbs-up icon that scales from 0 → 115 → 100 with overshoot easing over 24 frames, then a subtle wobble for 12 frames. Solid fill, brand teal.

starters.label: Rocket lift-off
starters.prompt: A small rocket icon that slides up from off-screen-bottom into view over 30 frames, with a brief exhaust trail of 3 fading dashes. Holds at top for 20 frames. 240×240.

starters.label: Shake bell
starters.prompt: A bell icon that shakes horizontally (translate ±6px, rotation ±10°) for 24 frames at 30 fps, then settles. Single trigger, no loop.

starters.label: Red X with vibration
starters.prompt: A red X (two crossed strokes, ~6px, rounded caps) draws on over 18 frames, then vibrates with a subtle horizontal shake (±4px) for 12 frames. Holds afterward.

starters.label: Warning triangle wobble
starters.prompt: A yellow warning triangle (with exclamation mark) that fades in over 12 frames, then wobbles in rotation (±5°) for 24 frames. 200×200, transparent background.

starters.label: Scale bounce
starters.prompt: A solid square that scales 100 → 110 → 100 with overshoot easing over 48 frames, looped.

starters.label: Slide-in toast
starters.prompt: A rounded rectangle (toast shape, 240×64) slides in from the right edge to its rest position over 30 frames with ease-out cubic. Holds.

starters.label: Button press feedback
starters.prompt: A rounded button (160×48, teal) that scales 100 → 96 → 100 over 12 frames on press, with a subtle inner-shadow flash. Single trigger, no loop.

starters.label: Hover-glow card
starters.prompt: A card outline (220×140, 12px radius) that gains a soft teal glow (blur ~16px) over 18 frames, then holds. Subtle scale 100 → 102.

starters.label: Tab indicator slide
starters.prompt: A short underline bar (60×3, teal) that slides horizontally 120px to its new tab position over 24 frames with ease-in-out. Holds afterward.

starters.label: Heart 'like' tap
starters.prompt: A red heart that scales from 0 → 110 → 100 over 18 frames, with a slight rotation flick at the peak. Then a tiny radial burst of small dots fading out for 12 frames.

starters.label: Draw-on circle outline
starters.prompt: A circle outline drawn on (trim 0 → 100) over 60 frames. Stroke ~4px, teal. After complete, fade to 50% opacity over 15 frames.

starters.label: Star fill-burst
starters.prompt: A 5-pointed star outline that fills with gold over 18 frames, then emits a small radial sparkle burst of 8 points fading out for 12 frames. 200×200.

starters.label: Bookmark fold
starters.prompt: A bookmark icon (ribbon shape) that flips/folds in from off-screen-top, settling with a small overshoot over 30 frames. Solid fill, brand teal.

starters.label: Notification bell shake
starters.prompt: A bell icon that shakes (rotation ±15°) for ~24 frames then settles. Add a small dot pulse for 'new notification' indicator.

starters.label: Badge pop-in
starters.prompt: A red circular badge with the number '1' that pops in from scale 0 → 120 → 100 over 18 frames with overshoot easing, attached to the top-right of an icon. Holds.

starters.label: Notification banner slide
starters.prompt: A horizontal banner (360×56, rounded) slides in from the top edge over 24 frames with ease-out, holds for 60 frames, then slides back up over 18 frames.

starters.label: Unread-dot pulse
starters.prompt: A small red dot (12×12) pulsing in opacity (60% → 100% → 60%) and scale (100 → 115 → 100), looped seamlessly over 60 frames at 30 fps.

starters.label: Incoming-message bounce
starters.prompt: A speech-bubble icon that drops in from above with a 2-step bounce on landing (100 → 90 → 105 → 100) over 30 frames. Then a subtle wiggle for 12 frames.
